---
title: Dir Appendix None
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - []
        - ["div#quarto-appendix"]
---

This document inherits `appendix-style: none` from directory `_metadata.yml`,
which overrides the project-level `appendix-style: plain`.
No appendix container should be created despite the project-level license.
